_comment: Tier-2 for ngsolve helmholtz#: pin the NGSolve module-location contract that catalog generators rely on. (a) NewtonCF/MinimizationCF live ONLY in ngsolve.fem (catalog says 'from ngsolve.fem import NewtonCF'). (b) GMResSolver/MinResSolver/BramblePasciakCG live ONLY in ngsolve.krylovspace. (c) Curl/Div (capital) do NOT exist at top level — only lowercase curl/div do, used in template weak forms. (d) solvers.Newton first two positional args are (a, u) where 'a' is the BilinearForm and 'u' is the trial GridFunction — catalog assumes this kwarg name in NL solver patterns. Derived from the new ngsolve_source_scanner.py. Verified empirically against NGSolve 6.2.2604 on 2026-06-01.
